esp32_i2s_create.tooltip: Create an I2S audio interface object

esp32_i2s_set_pins_std.message0: I2S object %1 Set standard mode pin BCLK%2 WS/LRC%3 DOUT%4 DIN%5 MCLK%6
esp32_i2s_set_pins_std.tooltip: Set the standard I2S mode pins, DIN and MCLK are optional, set to -1 if not used

esp32_i2s_set_pins_pdm_tx.message0: I2S object %1 Set PDM send pin CLK%2 DOUT0%3 DOUT1%4
esp32_i2s_set_pins_pdm_tx.tooltip: Set the pin for PDM transmission mode

esp32_i2s_set_pins_pdm_rx.message0: I2S object %1 Set PDM receiving pin CLK%2 DIN0%3 DIN1%4 DIN2%5 DIN3%6
esp32_i2s_set_pins_pdm_rx.tooltip: Set the pin for PDM reception mode

esp32_i2s_begin.message0: Initialize I2S object %1 Mode %2 Sampling rate %3 Hz Bit width %4 Channel %5 Slot %6
esp32_i2s_begin.tooltip: To initialize the I2S interface, the pins must be set first. Slot parameters can choose to use left/right/dual channels

esp32_i2s_configure_tx.message0: Configure I2S object %1 TX sampling rate %2 Hz bit width %3 channel %4 slot %5

esp32_i2s_configure_rx.message0: Configure I2S object %1 RX Sampling rate %2 Hz Bit width %3 Channel %4 Conversion %5

esp32_i2s_write_byte.tooltip: Write a single byte to I2S, usually written continuously in a loop

esp32_i2s_read_bytes.message0: I2S object %1 Read bytes into array %2 Read quantity %3
esp32_i2s_read_bytes.tooltip: Read the specified number of bytes from I2S to the array and return the actual number of bytes read

esp32_i2s_record_wav.message0: I2S object %1 Record WAV audio Duration %2 seconds Save size to %3
esp32_i2s_record_wav.tooltip: Record the WAV audio of the specified duration, return the byte array pointer, and save the size to the specified variable. Please use free() to release the memory after use.

esp32_i2s_play_wav.message0: I2S object %1 Play WAV audio data %2 Length %3
esp32_i2s_play_wav.tooltip: To play audio data in WAV format, the data length needs to be specified.

esp32_i2s_get_last_error.message0: Get the last error code of I2S object %1
esp32_i2s_get_last_error.tooltip: Get the error code of the last I2S operation, 0 means success

esp32_i2s_write_sample.message0: I2S object %1 writes sample value %2 (stereo writes left and right channels)
esp32_i2s_write_sample.tooltip: Write a 16-bit sample value to I2S and the left and right channels will be automatically written.

esp32_i2s_write_buffer.tooltip: Write buffer data to I2S and return the actual number of bytes written

esp32_i2s_available.message0: I2S object %1 Number of readable bytes
esp32_i2s_available.tooltip: Get the number of bytes readable in the I2S receive buffer

esp32_i2s_tx_sample_rate.tooltip: Get the sampling rate of the I2S sending channel

esp32_i2s_rx_sample_rate.tooltip: Get the sampling rate of the I2S receiving channel

esp32_i2s_set_inverted.message0: I2S object %1 Set signal inversion BCLK%2 WS%3 MCLK%4
esp32_i2s_set_inverted.tooltip: Set I2S signal inversion options for compatibility with different audio chips

esp32_i2s_generate_tone.message0: I2S object %1 Generates square wave tone Frequency %2 Hz Duration %3 ms Amplitude %4
esp32_i2s_generate_tone.tooltip: Generate a square wave tone of specified frequency and play it through I2S

esp32_i2s_free_wav_buffer.tooltip: Release the memory buffer allocated by recordWAV
